For-giving means giving something before another person has “earned it”.<ref name=":0">{{Cite web|title=Forgiveness - Awakening from the Meaning Crisis|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210307151557/https://awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com/forgiveness|website=[[awakeningfromthemeaningcrisis.com]]|date=2021-03-07|access-date=2022-11-10}}</ref>

For example, by sacrificing towards growing someone into their personhood, that is already forgiveness.<ref name=":0" />

Christian forgiveness is the ability to give [[agape|agapic love]], or to help others grow into fullness and meaning, through presence and attention.<ref name=":0" />

Nowadays, we tend to think of forgiveness as telling someone who feels sorry that it’s okay. However, the core idea of forgiveness doesn’t depend on your contrition.<ref name=":0" />

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Forgiveness]][[Category:Agape]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Forgiveness]][[sn:Forgiveness]]==References==
[[Category:Pages]]
